# Allowlist for the Connector Verified Linter workflow
# (.github/workflows/ci-connector-verified-linter.yml, issue #89).
#
# Each non-comment line is a fixed-string pattern (grep -F). Any linter
# ::error annotation containing one of these patterns is treated as a
# documented, intentional deviation and does not fail the job.
# Every entry MUST carry a "# reason" comment above it.

# reason: this repo publishes its own image (ghcr.io/whisper-sec/whisper-opencti);
# the opencti/connector-whisper image name only exists once the connector is
# merged and released upstream. The manifest intentionally keeps our image.
VC202: "container_image": "ghcr.io/whisper-sec/whisper-opencti" - expected "opencti/connector-whisper"

# reason: same as above - the user-facing docker-compose.yml snippet references
# whisper-sec/whisper-opencti, the image actually published from this repo,
# not the upstream opencti/connector-whisper name.
VC401: Image name 'whisper-sec/whisper-opencti' does not match expected 'opencti/connector-whisper'
